name: HumanBloodSandwich
short_description: China's most controversial game in 2020.In the first week in mainland China.The game gained more than 100 reviews.and became a very controversial issue.Valve directly forbidded selling this game in China On 2020-03-13.Now it's a game that can only be played outside mainland China. Please enjoy it.
detailed_description:
China's most controversial game in 2020.Chinese Government directly banned this game in China On 2020-03-13

This game tells a story of treating people with human blood.

In the first week in mainland China.The game gained more than 100 reviews and became a very controversial issue.

Now it's a game that can only be played outside mainland China. Please enjoy it.
---------------------------
Because the game type is so unique, I need to introduce how to play this game?

1. After starting the game, if you don't want to see the brief introduction of the plot, you can press ESC to enter the game scene.

2. After entering the game scene, you can press F1 or ESC to call up the help panel and press F1 or ESC again to close the help panel.

3. There are four buttons on the top of help panel. Players can click that "Medals" button to view 31 achievements in the game. The goal of the game is to complete these achievements. Note: all of the game's achievements need to be at least 2 rounds of game to complete. Playing one round is not enough to achieve all. Players can play a new game through the "new game" button. Or after finishing a round, the game will ask you whether to play a new game or not.

4. There is a portrait in the main interface of the game. There are two event buttons near the portrait. Click one of the two event buttons to enter the plot scene to finish achievement. Click the portrait to change new events.The emotional trigger of the game is mainly through the plot. But the biggest challenge of the game is that if you want to achieve all of achievements, you need to remember which stories you've seen and which haven't.

5. This game is a kind of visual novel game. There are different options for players to choose in some scenes. The different choices of the player to the plot decide the different end of the game.

6. In the plot scene, you can use "adqe" keys and "up,down" keys to adjust the camera's perspective. Use "ws" keys to adjust camera distance. It is convenient for players to choose their favorite angle to enjoy the plot.
